attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT MF_RCV_SHIPMENT_LINES.ASN_LINE_FLAG, MF_RCV_SHIPMENT_LINES.ATTRIBUTE14, MF_RCV_SHIPMENT_LINES.ATTRIBUTE15, MF_RCV_SHIPMENT_LINES.CATEGORY_ID, MF_RCV_SHIPMENT_LINES.COMMENTS, MF_RCV_SHIPMENT_LINES.COUNTRY_OF_ORIGIN_CODE, MF_RCV_SHIPMENT_LINES.CREATED_BY, MF_RCV_SHIPMENT_LINES.CREATION_DATE, MF_RCV_SHIPMENT_LINES.DELIVER_TO_LOCATION_ID, MF_RCV_SHIPMENT_LINES.DELIVER_TO_PERSON_ID, MF_RCV_SHIPMENT_LINES.DESTINATION_TYPE_CODE, MF_RCV_SHIPMENT_LINES.EMPLOYEE_ID, MF_RCV_SHIPMENT_LINES.GLOBAL_NAME, MF_RCV_SHIPMENT_LINES.GES_UPDATE_DATE, replace(replace(MF_RCV_SHIPMENT_LINES.ITEM_DESCRIPTION,chr(10),' '),chr(13),' ') ITEM_DESCRIPTION, MF_RCV_SHIPMENT_LINES.ITEM_ID, MF_RCV_SHIPMENT_LINES.ITEM_REVISION, MF_RCV_SHIPMENT_LINES.LAST_UPDATED_BY, MF_RCV_SHIPMENT_LINES.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, MF_RCV_SHIPMENT_LINES.LINE_NUM, MF_RCV_SHIPMENT_LINES.PACKING_SLIP, MF_RCV_SHIPMENT_LINES.PO_DISTRIBUTION_ID, MF_RCV_SHIPMENT_LINES.PO_HEADER_ID, MF_RCV_SHIPMENT_LINES.PO_LINE_ID, MF_RCV_SHIPMENT_LINES.PO_LINE_LOCATION_ID, MF_RCV_SHIPMENT_LINES.PO_RELEASE_ID, MF_RCV_SHIPMENT_LINES.PRIMARY_UNIT_OF_MEASURE, MF_RCV_SHIPMENT_LINES.QUANTITY_RECEIVED, MF_RCV_SHIPMENT_LINES.QUANTITY_SHIPPED, MF_RCV_SHIPMENT_LINES.REASON_ID, MF_RCV_SHIPMENT_LINES.REQUEST_ID, MF_RCV_SHIPMENT_LINES.REQUISITION_LINE_ID, MF_RCV_SHIPMENT_LINES.REQ_DISTRIBUTION_ID, MF_RCV_SHIPMENT_LINES.ROUTING_HEADER_ID, MF_RCV_SHIPMENT_LINES.SHIPMENT_HEADER_ID, MF_RCV_SHIPMENT_LINES.SHIPMENT_LINE_ID, MF_RCV_SHIPMENT_LINES.SHIPMENT_LINE_STATUS_CODE, MF_RCV_SHIPMENT_LINES.SHIP_TO_LOCATION_ID, MF_RCV_SHIPMENT_LINES.SOURCE_DOCUMENT_CODE, MF_RCV_SHIPMENT_LINES.TO_ORGANIZATION_ID, MF_RCV_SHIPMENT_LINES.TO_SUBINVENTORY, MF_RCV_SHIPMENT_LINES.UNIT_OF_MEASURE, MF_RCV_SHIPMENT_LINES.VENDOR_ITEM_NUM 
FROM
 MF_RCV_SHIPMENT_LINES
WHERE MF_RCV_SHIPMENT_LINES.GES_UPDATE_DATE
>TO_DATE('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS')
